# globalNex

> globalNex is an Outcome-as-a-Service platform for defense, aerospace, and heavy manufacturing. It delivers quantified material-risk conclusions — not a blank dashboard. Counter supplier price hikes with alloy-grade precision, map messy BOMs via Expert-in-the-Loop deployment, and get boardroom-ready exposure figures in seconds.

The painkiller: when a supplier claims aluminum is up and demands +12%, globalNex shows the exact 6061-T6 breakdown — aluminum is 97% of the grade, magnesium is down, true cost rose 4.2%. You counter at 5%. One interaction pays for the year.

## What you get (the outcome)

- A defensible negotiation counter backed by alloy-grade decomposition
- Boardroom-ready at-risk spend and margin impact figures
- Trigger alerts quantifying your exposure the morning macro news drops
- Expert-in-the-Loop team mapping your BOMs — you never clean the data

## How deployment works

1. **Map your BOMs** — ingestion engine auto-maps messy spreadsheets and ERP dumps to our metallurgical alloy database; experts validate edge cases
2. **Build your scenario studio** — custom shock models tuned to your geographic footprint and grades
3. **Act as your strategic wing** — fractional cost engineers and commodity strategists turn risk scores into hedging, dual-sourcing, and redesign moves

## The engine (proof, not the product)

- Alloy-grade composition decomposition (7075-T6, Ti-6Al-4V, Inconel 718, and more)
- Interactive scenario modeling: price shocks, production cuts, export bans
- Dollar impact: cost, at-risk spend, margin hit, availability, lead time
- Geographic supply concentration mapped to each grade's constituent metals

## Key pages

- [Home](https://glblnex.com/): Outcome overview, painkiller demo, Expert-in-the-Loop, FAQ
- [Request an assessment](https://glblnex.com/started): Apply to work with our team

## Who it is for

Defense, aerospace, automotive and EV, industrial manufacturing, medical devices, and energy companies where metal spend is material to cost and margin. Selective engagements — a limited number of manufacturers at a time.

## How globalNex compares

- **Pure SaaS tools**: hand you a login and a blank dashboard; you clean your own data; trivially copyable
- **Consultancies**: deliver a report in weeks; no live engine; knowledge walks out when the project ends
- **globalNex**: proprietary engine + alloy database + Expert-in-the-Loop team = the outcome neither can match alone
